title: Lighthouse Green Fuels Project: section 35 direction, Planning Act 2008
body: "Direction by the Secretary of State on the Lighthouse Green Fuels Project.  Date of decision  8 September 2025  Company/location   LGF Projects LimitedLondonEngland   Type of project  A second-generation Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) production facility / Section 35 Direction, Planning Act 2008.  Maximum output  Approximately 135,000 tonnes per year of second-generation Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF).  "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
